name: xft-comat
description: xft-comat Workflow is a lightweight, program-driven AI coding workflow for non-trivial features, bug fixes, and refactors with routed complexity, specialist guidance, TDD, review, validation, and traceable .xft-comat records.

interface.shortDescription: Program-driven coding workflow with traceable delivery records.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight workflow plugin for non-trivial features, bug fixes, and refactors. It helps route work by complexity, maintain .xft-comat records, and guide TDD, review, and validation.
defaultPrompt: Use xft-comat to deliver this change with traceability.
Run the xft-comat workflow for this bug fix.
Plan and validate this refactor with xft-comat.
